expectedIssues: Responsible gaming icon is missing from the top nav bar
reportedIssues: Navigation tab text is truncated - 'Hot Gam' appears to be cut off (likely 'Hot Games'). The rightmost navigation item is not fully visible.
Game cards in the exclusive and new games sections are cut off on the right edge. The rightmost game card in each row is partially hidden, affecting content discovery and user experience.
Game card images and titles appear to have inconsistent sizing and alignment across different rows, creating a visually uneven appearance.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a missing responsible gaming icon; they focus on truncated text, cut-off game cards, and inconsistent styling instead.
